headline: Amazon.com Shareholders Back Board as Jassy Touts AI, AWS Growth at Annual Meeting
summary: Amazon.com (NASDAQ:AMZN) shareholders approved the company’s director nominees, ratified Ernst & Young as independent auditor for fiscal 2026 and backed the company’s executive compensation plan at the company’s annual meeting, according to preliminary voting results announced during the meeting

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Palantir Technologies (PLTR) After Its Recent AI-Fueled Surge?
summary: Wondering if Palantir Technologies at US$137.15 is still offering value, or if most of the upside is already priced in? This article walks through the key numbers so you can judge for yourself. The stock is up 5.5% over the last week, but down 6.0% over the last month and down 18.3% year to date, while the 1 year return is 13.7% and the 3 year return is very large. Recent headlines have focused on Palantir's role in artificial intelligence and government data contracts, with investors...
